'''Zithrom's syndrome''' was a [[Kidney/Legends|kidney]] disorder that affected many elderly [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|males]]. It was kept in check through the use of [[Clondex]], although Clondex didn't cure the disease.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}}
